key_points: Tiered system: premium dorms require extra payment and GPA minimums
Regular freshman dorms are basic 2BR/1BA hallway-style, not luxury suites
Upperclassman apartment-style 'Phases' are popular and well-regarded
key_quotes: These aren't for regular freshman. These quad dorms are for students who pay extra and have to keep up certain grades to stay there.
The regular freshman dorms are 2 bedroom one bathroom with a hallway between your rooms.
I was so mad I gotta stay in the phases but I feel so much better after watching this

key_points: Vibrant HBCU energy with strong Greek life, band, and cheer culture
Graduation ceremonies disrupted by performative celebrations blocking other graduates
Strong gender ratio reportedly favors women meeting people socially
key_quotes: Man I miss that ratio. A lot of opportunities to win on the Hill.
I am so tired of seeing this... Selfish performances like this are not fair to others whose names are being called.
The chaos and the energy in this video, it's giving me LIFE

key_points: Campus is visually impressive with notable recent investment in facilities
Rural Prairie View location means limited off-campus options nearby
Football facilities described as 'immaculate' with further upgrades planned
key_quotes: Wow this was really great seeing HBCUs in a light like this. Crazy how they're going to get an updated facility even though it already looks immaculate.
At first I wasn't excited about my daughter choosing Prairie View but after researching the history and visiting I became a proud Panther Parent.

key_points: No alumni employment data or career service mentions in student discussions
Kirk Franklin collaboration signals strong band program visibility and industry connections
Football program turnaround from 0-90 losing streak suggests institutional growth mindset
key_quotes: I remember Prairie View going a decade without winning a football game... They came a long way.

key_points: Premium housing requires extra cost on top of tuition, budget accordingly
Texas A&M system affiliation provides resources historically denied for over a century

key_points: Strong HBCU pride with electric game days, band culture, and Greek life
Warm, welcoming community that embraces diverse students beyond just Black students
Move-in energy described as chaotic and exciting in the best way
key_quotes: The chaos and the energy in this video, it's giving me LIFE for when I'm a freshman next fall.
I love my HBCU!!! I knew this sound was too close to home when I was blasting it in my car.
So many memories living in the phases!!! Watching your vlog brought back so many memories when my family drove from Los Angeles to PV.

key_points: **Graduation conduct:** Students performing Greek dances block others' diploma moments publicly
**Housing inequality:** Premium dorms misrepresented online; standard freshman housing is far less impressive
